lifecycle.usageRule: Implement Breadcrumb from PDF contract first. If docs/rules/spec conflict, PDF wins.
lifecycle.migrationTrigger: Sync local docs/rules/spec whenever breadcrumb.pdf changes.

breadcrumb.description: Breadcrumb shows current location hierarchy and allows step-back navigation.

canonicalTerminology.rule: Use canonical names in docs/rules/contracts; avoid alternate labels.

structure.currentItemRule: Last item is current page and is not interactive.

tokens.label: var(--text-body)
tokens.marginBottom: var(--spacing-m) — space below breadcrumb so it does not stick to content; see docs/components/breadcrumb.md

interaction.clickableItems: All previous hierarchy items are interactive links/buttons.
interaction.currentItem: Current location is read-only text with aria-current='page'.
interaction.keyboard: Tab navigation only through interactive breadcrumb items.
interaction.overflow: Collapse middle segments with ellipsis when space is insufficient.
interaction.parentOwnsPath: Component does not mutate items/currentLabel; on activation parent updates route/state (e.g. truncate path to chosen segment). Ellipsis menu items use the same onPress as collapsed segments.
interaction.resolutionStates: Use resolutionState: default/loading/unavailable/deleted/restricted. Non-default states are non-interactive and should use neutral fallback labels.

responsive.rule: On narrow widths, preserve first and last levels and collapse middle levels first.
responsive.ellipsisRule: Collapsed segment can expand via menu/popover when requested by product flow.

blockingRules: If hierarchy/current item semantics cannot be satisfied, return BLOCKER.
If interactive breadcrumb states are missing, return FAIL.
Do not make current page item clickable.
reviewScenarios: Show breadcrumb with at least 4 levels and current-item semantics.
Demonstrate overflow strategy preserving first and last segment.
Demonstrate optional ellipsis item expansion behavior when interactive.
Demonstrate degraded resolution states with neutral fallback labels and non-interactive behavior.
a11yAcceptance: Current item exposes aria-current='page' and is not interactive.
Only interactive items are keyboard focus targets.
Overflow strategy preserves semantics and discoverability.
Resolution-state items are disabled and do not trigger navigation.

fail: Current item is interactive or lacks aria-current='page'.
Overflow strategy is missing for long paths.
Required interactive states are not visible in review harness.
Resolution-state items remain interactive and can route into invalid pages.
blocker: Cannot provide breadcrumb landmark and current-item semantics.
Missing token mapping for interactive/focus states.
